recipes.name: Greek Yogurt Granola Bowl
recipes.instructions: Layer yogurt, granola, and berries. Drizzle honey on top. Eat immediately.

recipes.name: Scrambled Eggs with Toast
recipes.instructions: Melt butter in skillet. Scramble eggs with salt. Toast bread. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Banana Almond Butter Smoothie
recipes.instructions: Blend banana, almond butter, milk, and chia seeds until smooth. Drink immediately.

recipes.name: Spinach and Egg Omelet
recipes.instructions: Heat butter in skillet. Pour beaten eggs, add spinach mid-cook. Fold omelet in half when set.

recipes.name: Quinoa Power Breakfast
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa according to package. Top with chia seeds, berries, and syrup. Serve warm or cold.

recipes.name: Chicken Sausage and Sweet Potato Hash
recipes.instructions: Cube sweet potatoes, sauté in avocado oil until crispy. Slice sausages, add to pan. Wilt spinach at end.

recipes.name: Berry Overnight Oats
recipes.instructions: Mix oats and milk in jar. Refrigerate overnight. Top with raspberries and honey in the morning.

recipes.name: Chickpea Salad
recipes.instructions: Chop spinach and carrots. Top with chickpeas. Drizzle with dressing. Toss and serve.

recipes.name: Cottage Cheese Fruit Plate
recipes.instructions: Scoop yogurt into bowl. Top with berries, walnuts, and honey. Serve chilled.

recipes.name: Rice and Bean Bowl
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Warm beans with sriracha. Combine and squeeze fresh lime juice. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Avocado Toast with Egg
recipes.instructions: Toast bread. Mash avocado on toast with salt. Fry egg, top avocado toast. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Lentil Soup (Quick)
recipes.instructions: Boil broth, add lentils. Dice and add carrots and onions. Simmer 20 minutes. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Peanut Butter Banana Toast
recipes.instructions: Toast bread. Spread peanut butter. Top with banana slices. Drizzle honey.

recipes.name: Chicken Breast with Roasted Broccoli
recipes.instructions: Season and bake chicken at 400°F for 20 min. Toss broccoli with oil and salt, roast alongside.

recipes.name: Veggie and Bean Wrap
recipes.instructions: Warm tortilla. Layer beans, spinach, avocado. Roll tightly. Slice in half and serve.

recipes.name: Oatmeal with Walnuts
recipes.instructions: Boil milk, add oats. Cook 5 min. Top with walnuts and syrup. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Grilled Chicken with Sweet Potato
recipes.instructions: Bake chicken and sweet potato at 400°F for 20 min. Top chicken with sriracha and lime.

recipes.name: Chia Seed Pudding
recipes.instructions: Mix chia seeds, milk, honey in jar. Refrigerate 2 hours. Top with berries before eating.

recipes.name: Turkey Meatballs with Marinara
recipes.instructions: Form ground turkey into balls. Bake at 400°F for 15 min. Heat marinara, add meatballs. Serve over cooked quinoa.

recipes.name: Blackberry Smoothie Bowl
recipes.instructions: Blend yogurt and blackberries until thick. Pour into bowl. Top with oats and honey.

recipes.name: Beef and Broccoli Stir-Fry (Quick)
recipes.instructions: Slice steak thin. Heat sesame oil in wok. Stir-fry beef 2 min, add broccoli 3 min. Toss with coconut aminos.

recipes.name: Chickpea Buddha Bowl
recipes.instructions: Dice all vegetables. Toss with chickpeas and dressing. Serve chilled or room temperature.

recipes.name: Veggie Wrap with Chickpeas
recipes.instructions: Warm tortilla. Layer spinach, chickpeas, shredded carrots. Roll tightly and serve.

recipes.name: Baked Sweet Potato with Almonds
recipes.instructions: Bake sweet potato at 400°F for 25 min. Top with almonds, chia seeds, honey. Serve warm.

recipes.name: Veggie Omelet with Toast
recipes.instructions: Dice onion. Beat eggs with butter in skillet. Add onion, fold omelet. Toast bread on the side.

recipes.name: Lentil and Carrot Soup
recipes.instructions: Boil broth, add lentils and diced vegetables. Simmer 20 min until tender. Season to taste.

recipes.name: Roasted Chicken Thighs with Asparagus
recipes.instructions: Toss chicken and asparagus with oil and salt. Roast at 400°F for 20 min. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Smoothie with Protein Powder
recipes.instructions: Blend all ingredients until smooth. Drink immediately or refrigerate for later.

recipes.name: Rice Bowl with Black Lentils
recipes.instructions: Cook rice and lentils separately. Combine in bowl. Top with diced onion and squeeze of fresh lime.

recipes.name: Cottage Cheese with Berries and Granola
recipes.instructions: Layer yogurt, berries, granola in bowl. Drizzle honey on top. Serve immediately.

recipes.name: Grilled Portobello Mushroom & Quinoa Salad
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa. Grill portobellos 4 min per side. Chop and mix with cooled quinoa. Toss with spinach, walnuts, and vinaigrette.

recipes.name: Turkey Bolognese with Zucchini Noodles
recipes.instructions: Brown turkey in avocado oil. Add marinara and spinach. Spiralize zucchini into noodles, boil 3 min. Plate noodles, top with sauce.

recipes.name: Barley & Vegetable Power Stew
recipes.instructions: Boil broth, add barley, lentils, and diced vegetables. Simmer 25 min until all tender. Season well.

recipes.name: Herb-Crusted Chicken Paillard with Greens
recipes.instructions: Pound chicken flat. Season with herbs. Pan-sear 4 min per side. Serve over dressed greens and shredded carrots.

recipes.name: Beetroot & Black Bean Wrap
recipes.instructions: Warm tortillas. Layer beans, beetroot, spinach, avocado. Roll tightly. Serve with lime wedge.

recipes.name: Baked Cod with Tomato Relish
recipes.instructions: Bake chicken at 400°F for 15 min. Chop tomatoes, onion, basil for relish. Top chicken with relish and squeeze of lime.

recipes.name: Chickpea Curry with Brown Rice
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Sauté onions, add turmeric and chickpeas. Simmer in coconut milk 15 min. Serve curry over rice.

recipes.name: Loaded Quinoa & Kale Salad
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa, cool. Massage kale with olive oil. Combine with quinoa, chickpeas. Top with avocado, drizzle tahini dressing.

recipes.name: Sweet Potato & Black Bean Burrito Bowl
recipes.instructions: Cube and bake sweet potatoes 20 min. Warm beans with spices. Assemble bowls with potatoes, beans, spinach, peppers. Drizzle dressing.

recipes.name: Lentil & Vegetable Pasta
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta. Dice peppers and carrots, sauté. Add marinara and spinach. Toss with cooked pasta. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Roasted Root Vegetable & Farro Bowl
recipes.instructions: Cook farro. Toss root vegetables with oil, roast 20 min. Combine farro and roasted veggies, drizzle vinaigrette.

recipes.name: Thai Basil Ground Turkey Lettuce Wraps
recipes.instructions: Brown turkey, add diced pepper and basil. Toss with sriracha-lime sauce. Serve in lettuce cups with lime.

recipes.name: Creamy Mushroom & Barley Risotto
recipes.instructions: Sauté onion and garlic, add mushrooms. Toast barley, gradually add broth while stirring. Cook 20 min until tender.

recipes.name: Beet & Walnut Salad with Goat Cheese
recipes.instructions: Cube roasted beets. Toss with spinach, walnuts. Crumble goat cheese on top. Drizzle with vinaigrette.

recipes.name: Slow-Cooker Turkey Chili
recipes.instructions: Brown turkey, add beans, tomatoes, spices. Transfer to slow cooker. Cook 6 hours on low. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Mediterranean Chickpea Salad
recipes.instructions: Chop all vegetables. Combine with drained chickpeas. Drizzle dressing. Toss and let sit 10 min before serving.

recipes.name: Beef Stir-Fry with Brown Rice
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Slice steak thin. Stir-fry beef 3 min, add vegetables 5 min. Toss with coconut aminos. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Baked Turkey Meatloaf with Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Mix turkey, diced vegetables, spinach, bread crumbs. Form loaf. Bake at 375°F for 25 min. Cool 5 min before slicing.

recipes.name: Herbed Lentil & Sweet Potato Salad
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils and cubed sweet potato separately. Cool, combine with spinach and herbs. Toss with lemon vinaigrette.

recipes.name: Pesto Quinoa with Roasted Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa. Roast diced vegetables 20 min. Blend basil, pine nuts, olive oil for pesto. Toss all together.

recipes.name: Black Bean & Quinoa Stuffed Peppers
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa. Halve peppers, scoop seeds. Mix quinoa, beans, corn, spinach. Stuff peppers, bake at 375°F for 20 min.

recipes.name: Turmeric Chicken with Roasted Root Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Season chicken with turmeric. Toss root vegetables with oil. Roast all at 400°F for 20 min. Serve together.

recipes.name: Spinach & Lentil Dal with Rice
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Sauté onions with spices, add lentils and water. Simmer 15 min, add spinach at end. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Mixed Vegetable & Egg Fried Rice
recipes.instructions: Heat oil in wok. Scramble eggs, set aside. Stir-fry vegetables 3 min. Add rice, coconut aminos, return eggs. Toss 2 min.

recipes.name: White Bean & Kale Soup
recipes.instructions: Boil broth, add beans and diced vegetables. Simmer 15 min. Rough-chop kale, add at end. Cook 5 min more.

recipes.name: Grilled Portobello & Lentil Stack
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils. Grill mushrooms 4 min per side. Layer: spinach, lentils, halved mushroom, tomatoes. Drizzle balsamic.

recipes.name: Baked Sweet Potato & Black Bean Tacos
recipes.instructions: Bake cubed sweet potatoes 20 min. Warm beans. Heat tortillas. Assemble with beans, potatoes, spinach, crema, lime.

recipes.name: Beet & Lentil Meatballs with Marinara
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils, mix with grated beets, bread crumbs, egg. Form balls, bake 18 min. Heat marinara, toss with meatballs.

recipes.name: Thai Green Curry Chicken with Rice
recipes.instructions: Cook rice. Dice chicken and peppers. Simmer curry paste in coconut milk 8 min. Add chicken, peppers, simmer 10 min. Serve over rice.

recipes.name: Roasted Carrot & Quinoa Power Bowl
recipes.instructions: Cook quinoa. Cut carrots into batons, roast 20 min. Warm chickpeas. Assemble bowl with all components, drizzle tahini.

recipes.name: Baked Falafel with Tahini & Roasted Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Pulse soaked chickpeas, parsley, spices. Form patties, bake 25 min. Roast vegetables alongside. Serve with tahini sauce.

recipes.name: Layered Lentil & Vegetable Casserole
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils. Layer: marinara, lentils, spinach, sliced zucchini, carrots. Repeat. Bake at 375°F for 30 min covered.

recipes.name: Slow-Cooker Turkey Meatball Marinara with Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Form turkey meatballs. Brown 8 min. Transfer to slow cooker with marinara, peppers, mushrooms. Cook 6 hours on low. Add spinach last 30 min.

recipes.name: Vegetable & Lentil Soup with Homemade Stock
recipes.instructions: Simmer broth with lentils 25 min. Add diced vegetables, cook 15 min. Stir in spinach. Simmer until all tender, season well.

recipes.name: Baked Eggplant Parmesan with Side Salad
recipes.instructions: Slice eggplant, salt 15 min. Bake at 400°F for 12 min. Layer with marinara, herbs. Bake 20 min. Serve with dressed spinach salad.

recipes.name: Spiced Chickpea & Vegetable Tagine
recipes.instructions: Sauté onion, add spices, tomato paste. Add broth, chickpeas, vegetables. Simmer 25 min until all tender. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Baked Whole Grain Pasta Primavera
recipes.instructions: Cook pasta. Toss roasted vegetables with marinara. Combine with pasta. Bake at 375°F for 15 min. Serve hot.

recipes.name: Herb-Braised Beef with Root Vegetables
recipes.instructions: Brown beef. Add broth, vegetables, herbs. Braise at 325°F for 2.5 hours. Meat should be very tender. Serve with vegetables and broth.

recipes.name: Vegetable Biryani with Basmati Rice
recipes.instructions: Layer parboiled rice, fried onions, spiced vegetables. Cover, cook on low heat 25 min. Fluff and serve.

recipes.name: Multi-Bean Chili with Toppings
recipes.instructions: Sauté onions, add spices. Add beans and tomatoes. Simmer 30 min. Serve with avocado, spinach, lime toppings.

recipes.name: Homemade Vegetable Broth & Quinoa Soup
recipes.instructions: Simmer vegetable scraps 30 min for broth. Strain, use to cook quinoa. Add mushrooms, spinach, herbs. Simmer 15 min.

recipes.name: Stuffed Acorn Squash with Wild Rice & Lentils
recipes.instructions: Halve squash, scoop seeds, roast 25 min. Cook wild rice and lentils. Mix with spinach, walnuts. Stuff squash, bake 10 min more.

recipes.name: Three-Bean & Vegetable Minestrone
recipes.instructions: Sauté onion and garlic. Add broth, beans, tomatoes, diced vegetables. Simmer 30 min. Add spinach at end. Season and serve.

recipes.name: Roasted Root Vegetable & Farro Risotto
recipes.instructions: Roast vegetables 20 min. Toast farro, gradually add warm broth. Stir constantly 20 min. Fold in roasted vegetables.

recipes.name: Lentil & Mushroom Wellington with Greens
recipes.instructions: Cook lentils. Sauté finely chopped mushrooms until dry. Mix with lentils, walnuts, spinach. Wrap in pastry. Bake 25 min at 400°F until golden.
